Our Products

We provide automated and value-added strategies for liquidity providers in perpetual markets, various strategies are offered to suit the risk appetite of users

  • Liquor Series

    Provides automated and value-added strategies for liquidity providers in perpetual markets.

  • Non-Alcoholic Series

    Delivers capital backing to corresponding Liquor products. The most secure option, always.

  • Cocktail Series

    A diverse mix of LP Tokens and Pendle Tokens, optimising returns within a controlled risk framework.

  • Bartender

    Our in-depth analytic tool delivering timely insights and performance data on the Perp DEX landscape within the Arbitrum ecosystem

    2023 Q3

    • Launch Market Insight Dashboard

    • Launch HLP (Hyperliquid) Leverage

    2024 Q2

    2024 Q2
